description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a combination of white and brown exterior finishes. The house includes a large outdoor swimming pool, a shaded patio area with outdoor furniture, and landscaped greenery with decorative plants and trees. The front facade showcases a wide driveway leading to a double garage, partially covered by a slatted pergola, and a main entrance sheltered by an overhang. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the indoor and outdoor spaces. The rooftop includes planters and a small terrace area, adding to the contemporary aesthetic. The overall structure is spacious, with open areas for parking, recreation, and relaxation.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a pool, and a double garage, featuring minimalist landscaping and outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the pool, patio with umbrellas, and the main living area with large brown shutters and a rooftop planter.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the double garage, driveway, main entrance with overhang, and a tree near the entryway.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the side of the house with the garage, driveway, rooftop planters, and a more solid wall with fewer windows.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the rear of the house, showing the pool, patio, and extensive landscaping with large plants and a flat roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide overhang, double doors, a paved approach, and a small landscaped area with a tree.
